title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.170 - Testimony to be written — exceptions to be stated in report
text:
515.170.  Testimony to be written — exceptions to be stated in report. — All testimony taken before referees shall be reduced to writing, and if either party shall except to the competency of a witness or the admission or exclusion of evidence, or any other matter to which exceptions may be taken, the referees, if required, shall state the particulars of the exceptions in their report.
(RSMo 1939 § 1156) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 990; 1919 § 1440; 1909 § 2010
